description: Same employee, same dates, same basic — run once with exit_reason=resignation and once with exit_reason=termination. Under Federal Decree-Law 33/2021 Art. 51, both must produce IDENTICAL gratuity. The old-law reductions (1/3 for <3yr, 2/3 for <5yr) were abolished in 2021.
law_reference: Federal Decree-Law No. 33/2021, Article 51 — no reduction for resignation

expected.invariant: gratuity_resign == gratuity_terminate — any difference means old-law reduction code is still active

code_gap: Current gratuity.py lines 102-106 apply the old-law reduction for 3-5yr resignations. Remove those lines to fix. This test WILL FAIL against the current code.
